availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - Accept with Freddie's corrections, as well as the following: lin4: ⲛⲛ ==> <:μέν=grc|reg|ⲙⲛ:> ; lin6: implement Freddie's correction, but mark up <:κατά=grc|reg|ⲕⲁ[ⲧⲁ]:> on both sides ; lin8: implement ϩⲁ ⲙⲁ [ⲛ][.?] (add Freddie's spaces and the partial reconstruction of lacuna) ; lin10-11: <:ϫ[.?][ⲁ]11. ⲙⲁϩⲧⲉ=PN T. Laver|ed|ϫ[.?]ⲙⲁϩⲧⲉ:> ; lin12: [.?] ⲛ̣ add space and add [.?] after the Greek reg.

Vote - AcceptText - Commentary: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations. lin3=> ⲡ(ⲗⲁϣ(ⲁⲛⲉ)) (move the article out of the abbreviation) lin5=> <:ⲉⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧ{ⲧ}ⲥⲟⲛ=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ⲉⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧⲧⲥⲟⲛ:> (Crum just notes "sic"); ⲙⲛ ⲛ[ⲉⲧⲛⲙ]6.- ⲙⲏⲧⲛ (add space, add reconstruction) lin6=> <:ⲕⲁ[ⲧⲁ ⲛⲉⲩⲣⲁⲛ]=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ⲕⲁ[ⲧⲁ ⲛⲉⲛⲣⲁⲛ]:> lin7=> <:ϯⲧⲁ[ⲙⲟ ⲛⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛ]8.- ⲧⲥⲟⲛ=PN F. Krueger (common phraseology)|ed|ϯⲧⲁ[ⲙⲟ] [.?]8. ⲧⲥⲟⲛ:> lin8=> ϩⲁ ⲙⲁ [.?] (add spaces) lin12=> [.?]ⲛ̣<:<:διάφορος|alt|διαφορά:>=grc|reg|ⲇⲓⲁⲫⲟⲣ[.?]:> (these two are attested in Coptic, διαφορεῖν isn't)
Submit - Added text from the edition. Please check the Greek loanwords carefully. In lin5 I think that ⲉⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧⲥⲟⲛ is intended (to account for Crum's sic). Not sure how we are entering this.

div.p: Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
ⲧⲁⲥ ⲛⲡⲁⲥⲟⲛ ⲙⲁ
ⲑⲓⲟⲥ ϩⲓⲧⲛ ⲓⲱⲥⲏⲫ
ⲡⲗⲁϣⲁⲛⲉ ⲛϫⲏⲙⲉ ⲛϣⲟ
ⲣⲡ μένⲙⲛ ⲛⲡϣⲁϫⲉ ϯϣⲓⲛⲉ
ⲉⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧⲧⲥⲟⲛⲉⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧⲧⲥⲟⲛ ⲙⲛ ⲛⲉⲧⲛⲙ
ⲙⲏⲧⲛ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ κατάⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲉⲩⲣⲁⲛκατάⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲉⲛⲣⲁⲛ
ⲙⲛⲥⲱⲥ ϯⲧⲁⲙⲟ ⲛⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛ
ⲧⲥⲟⲛϯⲧⲁⲙⲟ
ⲧⲥⲟⲛ ϩⲁ ⲙⲁ ⲛ
ⲅⲉⲣⲙⲁⲛⲟⲥ ⲛⲕ
ⲧⲛⲛⲟⲟⲩⲥ ⲛⲁϥ ϫⲁ
ⲙⲁϩⲧⲉϫⲙⲁϩⲧⲉ ⲙⲟϥ ϩⲟⲧ
ⲛδιάφοροςδιαφοράⲇⲓⲁⲫⲟⲣ
